name: Implement Queue using Stack
category: Stack and Queues [Learning, Pre-In-Post-fix, Monotonic Stack, Implementation]
statement:
Implement a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) queue using two stacks. The implemented queue should support the following operations: push, pop, peek, and isEmpty.


Implement the StackQueue class:


void push(int x): Adds element x to the end of the queue.

int pop(): Removes and returns the front element of the queue.

int peek(): Returns the front element of the queue without removing it.

boolean isEmpty(): Returns true if the queue is empty, false otherwise.

examples.explanation: StackQueue queue = new StackQueue(); queue.push(4); queue.push(8); queue.pop(); // returns 4 queue.peek(); // returns 8 queue.isEmpty(); // returns false
StackQueue queue = new StackQueue(); queue.isEmpty(); // returns true
